error.signature: InternalError: Blas GEMM launch failed : a]=[32,128], b=[128,64] [Op:MatMul]

verdict.summary: GPU BLAS kernel failed to launch. Caused by GPU memory exhaustion, CUDA version mismatch, or another process holding the GPU.

dead_ends.action: Set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES to empty to run on CPU
dead_ends.why_fails: Avoids GPU entirely. The real fix is resolving the GPU resource conflict.

dead_ends.action: Reboot the machine to clear GPU state
dead_ends.why_fails: Only helps if a zombie process holds the GPU. Identify and kill the process instead.

workarounds.action: Enable GPU memory growth to avoid pre-allocating all VRAM
workarounds.how: tf.config.experimental.set_memory_growth(gpu, True)  # prevents TF from claiming all VRAM

workarounds.action: Check for other processes using the GPU and kill them
workarounds.how: nvidia-smi  # check for processes; kill -9 <pid>  # free GPU memory

workarounds.action: Ensure cuBLAS version matches CUDA toolkit
workarounds.how: ldconfig -p | grep cublas  # verify libcublas matches your CUDA version
